gw.title: Istio Gateway (Envoy)
gw.description: Envoy-based reverse proxy that receives all inference requests. Runs Kuadrant Wasm filter for auth/rate-limiting and ext_proc filters for payload processing and scheduling.
details: External model providers or on-cluster InferencePool

p_rguard.title: request-guard (nemo)
p_rguard.description: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails — evaluates safety policies on the incoming request before any processing. Can block requests that violate content policies.

p_ims.title: intelligent-model-selection
p_ims.description: Automatically selects the optimal model or provider based on request characteristics, cost, latency, and availability.

p_mpr.title: model-provider-resolver
p_mpr.description: Uses a Kubernetes reconciler to watch ExternalModel CRDs. Resolves the model name to a provider, target model ID, and endpoint URL.

p_bfth.title: body-field-to-header
p_bfth.description: Extracts the "model" field from the JSON request body and sets it as the X-Gateway-Model-Name HTTP header for model-based routing.

p_bmth.title: base-model-to-header
p_bmth.description: Resolves LoRA adapter names to their base model using Kubernetes ConfigMaps. Sets X-Gateway-Base-Model-Name header so EPP can select pods running the correct base model.
details: LoRA adapter routing to correct InferencePool

p_at_req.title: api-translation (request)
p_at_req.description: Translates OpenAI Chat Completions format to provider-native API. Handles path rewriting, header mutations, and body transformation.

p_aki.title: apikey-injection
p_aki.description: Reads the provider API key from a Kubernetes Secret and injects the appropriate auth header for the target provider.

p_at_resp.title: api-translation (response)
p_at_resp.description: Translates provider-native response back to OpenAI Chat Completions format. Normalizes content, stop reasons, and usage tokens.

p_resp_guard.title: response-guard (nemo)
p_resp_guard.description: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails — evaluates content policies on the provider response after api-translation converts it to OpenAI format.

auth.title: Auth (Authorino)
auth.description: Authorino auth server called via gRPC from the Wasm shim. Validates the MaaS API key and resolves subscription info.

rlimit.title: Rate Limit (Limitador)
rlimit.description: Limitador rate-limit server called via gRPC from the Wasm shim. Implements token-based rate limiting via TokenRateLimitPolicy.

maas.title: MaaS API
maas.description: MaaS API server that manages API keys, subscriptions, and model listings. Called by Authorino during auth validation. Requires 3 CRDs to be created for each model offering.
details: Maps user-facing model name to provider endpoint and target model ID
Configures API key authentication via K8s Secret
Defines quota — associates user/team with allowed models and rate limits

epp.title: llm-d Scheduler / EPP
epp.description: An ext_proc filter like IPP. Runs the Endpoint Picker Proxy (EPP) to select the optimal pod for on-cluster inference.

sched.title: Endpoint Picker
sched.description: Selects the optimal pod for disaggregated serving. Routes to Prefill or Decode variants based on KV cache utilization and model affinity.
details: KV cache utilization, queue depth, model affinity

sidecar.title: Sidecar
sidecar.description: Coordinates the P/D disaggregation transaction. Communicates with the prefill worker IP and orchestrates the KV cache transfer to the decode worker.

prefill.title: Prefill Pod B (vLLM)
prefill.description: Processes the input prompt and generates the initial KV cache. Returns KVXfer metadata to enable the decode pod to pull KV cache via NIXL.

decode.title: Decode Pod A (vLLM)
decode.description: Generates output tokens auto-regressively using KV cache pulled from the prefill pod via NIXL high-speed interconnect.

nixl.title: NIXL — KV Transfer
nixl.description: NVIDIA Inference Xfer Library. High-speed KV cache transfer between prefill and decode pods over GPU-direct RDMA or Data Center Network.

anthropic.title: Anthropic
anthropic.description: Claude API endpoint. Receives requests translated from OpenAI format to Anthropic Messages API format. Requires an ExternalModel CRD to configure.
details: provider: anthropic, targetModel: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, url: https://api.anthropic.com

openai.title: OpenAI
openai.description: OpenAI API endpoint. Requests pass through without format translation (native OpenAI format). Requires an ExternalModel CRD.
details: provider: openai, targetModel: gpt-4o-mini, url: https://api.openai.com

azure.title: Azure OpenAI
azure.description: Azure OpenAI endpoint. Uses api-key header. Content filter fields stripped. Requires an ExternalModel CRD.
details: provider: azure, targetModel: gpt-4.1-mini, url: https://{resource}.openai.azure.com

bedrock.title: AWS Bedrock
bedrock.description: AWS Bedrock endpoint (OpenAI-compatible). Uses base64-encoded access key. Requires an ExternalModel CRD.

vertex.title: Google Vertex AI
vertex.description: Vertex AI endpoint (OpenAI-compatible). Path rewritten to Vertex format. Requires an ExternalModel CRD.

steps.text: 23. Wasm reports token count to Limitador
33. Wasm reports token count to Limitador

ext.label: ⑤ MaaS API responds: key valid

auth.label: ⑤ MaaS API responds: key INVALID

rl.label: ⑤ MaaS API responds: key valid

inc.label: ⑤ MaaS API responds: key valid
㉓ NIXL → Decode Pod A (pull KVs)
